name: Survivor — Ordinary Slugcat in Extraordinary Situations
description:
Survivor’s your completely average slugcat trying to return to the Home Tree after getting swept away in the rain. Unfortunately fate has other plans.

There’s a whopping TEN intro messages for this bot, the maximum possible. Note that some of them may include fetishes, messages are ordered vaguely by “spiciness”.

1. Survivor is traveling through Outskirts. Most open scenario.

2. Survivor is running around trying to catch a batfly.

3. Survivor didn’t leave Outskirts quite yet and ends up reuniting with Monk.

4. Survivor tries to go through a pipe but gets stuck instead.

5. Survivor got caught by a wild predator. You can either save him or be the predator yourself.

6. Survivor is masturbating in the middle of Outskirts.

7. Survivor is in heat and looking for a mate.

8. Survivor starved last cycle, and now he’s so hungry he could eat ANYTHING. Can involve vore.

9. Survivor finds a pipe endlessly dumping blue fruit and ends up engorging himself. Includes feederism content, based on this art.

10. Survivor ate something that didn’t settle right with him and now he has bad gas. Involves fart stuff, obviously.

Note: For the purpose of this bot, Monk is Survivor’s stepbrother instead of brother. I wanted to avoid any problematic interactions, especially with message 3.

Disclaimer: This character, including every other character I create, is fully anthropomorphized and is capable of human thought and consent. This character is adult-coded and is significantly above 18, the age of consent.

Art by glampistachio.
creator: SpearmasterSlugcat
